title: 據報英國明天將公布BNO居英權細節

replies.msg:
Mr Raab confirmed that he will update the House of Commons on Monday on the extradition agreement with Hong Kong following the imposition of the new security laws by Beijing.

He will also discuss the offer of citizenship to nearly three million British overseas nationals living in Hong Kong.

英國外相證實，在北京實施港區國安法之後，他將在星期一向下議院交待與香港的引渡協議詳情。

他還將討論英國向居住在香港的近300萬英國國民提供公民身份的問題。

https://www.express.co.uk/news/world/1311439/China-threat-UK-Dominic-Raab-Beijing-Hong-Kong-Huawei-Boris-Johnson-latest-news?fbclid=IwAR3bBmIqol7zlZQi3_dNDl-mkvLmX6oq4kiBtlxZfsrwN-1EEZ4QWK0lILg

replies.msg:
免簽係通常short stay(<180日), 旅遊等等
正常係外地拎residence係要英國home office出visa比你
去之前要係香港搞一大輪野
包括照肺/預約交文件印指紋等等
到時會有home office既信同passport貼左個visa咁樣寄番比你
然後你入境係要show封信出黎

除非對BNO有特別安排, 如果唔係應該都係咁

replies.msg:
One of the International Experience Canada (IEC) categories of work permits is known as ‘Young Professionals’. It allows young people from more than 20 countries to live and work in Canada for up to two years.

It is designed for those who wish to further their careers by gaining professional work experience in Canada.

IEC Young Professionals candidates will need to have a valid job offer in Canada prior to their arrival, and participants will need to work for the same employer, in the same location, during their stay in Canada.



Young Professionals其實同working holiday冇咩分別

Mr Raab confirmed that he will update the House of Commons on Monday on the extradition agreement with Hong Kong following the imposition of the new security laws by Beijing.

He will also discuss the offer of citizenship to nearly three million British overseas nationals living in Hong Kong.

他還將討論英國向居住在香港的近300萬英國國民提供公民身份的問題。
